interventionVersions.name: Weight Training (Starting Strength 5x5)
interventionVersions.description: Barbell compound training focused on progressive overload for strength and lean mass.

effects.assumptions: Average adherence, sufficient recovery and protein intake.
Indirect transfer from improved work capacity.

contraindications.warning: Combining high-volume cardio with strength training in a caloric deficit can impair hypertrophy and recovery. Prioritize sleep and protein intake.

interventionVersions.name: Cardio (Moderate Intensity, 3x/week)
interventionVersions.description: Zone 2 + moderate interval conditioning for cardiovascular health.

contraindications.warning: High cardio load with chronic sleep debt may worsen stress and blunt recovery.

interventionVersions.name: Diet Intervention (500 kcal/day deficit)
interventionVersions.description: Structured clean eating plan with moderate caloric deficit and high satiety foods.

effects.assumptions: Neutral effect unless hunger disrupts sleep.

contraindications.warning: Combining a large caloric deficit with high training volume can increase fatigue, hunger, and muscle loss risk.

interventionVersions.name: Screen Time Reduction (No screens 1 hour before bed)
interventionVersions.description: Reduces evening screen exposure to improve sleep onset and recovery.

effects.assumptions: Sleep quality improves alongside sleep duration.
Reduced cognitive load and better evening wind-down.
